assertions.rationale: Current branch tip e854367d3600f127c5e6420e9c88e1eb5edaa10f has an authoritative ci.yml run on the same head SHA (run 24757119845), but its build-ios job 72432613834 failed at the Build iOS (Debug, Simulator) step with exit code 65. The job log shows Xcode trying to compile /Users/runner/work/mobile/mobile/ios/EnboxMobile/NativeBiometricVault/EnboxMobile/NativeBiometricVault/RCTNativeBiometricVault.mm and failing because that doubled path does not exist. Local repo inspection shows the file exists at ios/EnboxMobile/NativeBiometricVault/RCTNativeBiometricVault.mm, and ios/EnboxMobile.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj contains both a PBXGroup path and PBXFileReference path of EnboxMobile/NativeBiometricVault, which explains the duplicated path seen in CI. Therefore VAL-NATIVE-013 is not validated for the current branch tip.

Current branch tip e854367d3600f127c5e6420e9c88e1eb5edaa10f matches origin/mission/biometric-vault, and the authoritative ci.yml run for that exact head SHA is run 24757119845. In that run, build-android job 72432613853 completed successfully, the Build Android (debug) step finished with BUILD SUCCESSFUL, and actions/upload-artifact uploaded artifact android-debug-apk (artifact id 6569511234). Downloading that artifact into the assigned evidence directory produced app-debug.apk, which the local file command identified as an Android package (APK). Therefore VAL-NATIVE-021 is validated for the current branch tip.

summary.text: Validated the current mission/biometric-vault branch tip against authoritative ci.yml run 24757119845. VAL-NATIVE-021 now passes for the current tip, while VAL-NATIVE-013 fails for the current tip because the build-ios job references a nonexistent doubled NativeBiometricVault source path and exits 65.

frictions.description: At the start of validation, the only ci.yml run for the current branch tip was still in progress.
frictions.resolution: Waited on run 24757119845 with gh run watch, then inspected its completed jobs, logs, and artifacts once it finished.

commands: git -C /home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile remote -v && git -C /home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile rev-parse HEAD && git -C /home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile rev-parse origin/mission/biometric-vault && git -C /home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile log --oneline origin/mission/biometric-vault..HEAD
gh run list --repo enboxorg/mobile --workflow ci.yml --branch mission/biometric-vault --limit 10 --json databaseId,headSha,headBranch,displayTitle,status,conclusion,createdAt,updatedAt,url
gh run view 24757119845 --repo enboxorg/mobile --job 72432613834 --log | rg -n -C 3 'Build input file cannot be found|RCTNativeBiometricVault|BUILD FAILED|Process completed with exit code 65'
